patches.content:
Index: 
===================================================================
--- 
+++ 
@@ -1,6 +1,21 @@
 <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
 <network-security-config>
-    <domain-config cleartextTrafficPermitted="true">
+    <!-- Configuração padrão: apenas tráfego HTTPS/WSS permitido -->
+    <base-config cleartextTrafficPermitted="false">
+        <trust-anchors>
\ No newline at end of file
+            <!-- Usa certificados do sistema Android -->
+            <certificates src="system" />
+        </trust-anchors>
+    </base-config>
+
+    <!-- Libera acesso seguro ao seu backend e WebSocket (Railway) -->
+    <domain-config cleartextTrafficPermitted="false">
+        <!-- Domínio principal do backend -->
         <domain includeSubdomains="true">appacademia-production-be7e.up.railway.app</domain>
+
+        <!-- Permite conexões WSS (WebSocket Secure) -->
+        <trust-anchors>
+            <certificates src="system" />
+        </trust-anchors>
     </domain-config>
-</network-security-config>
+</network-security-config>
